items.title: Pair of relevant notes on Kristaps Porzingis' new contract, per sources.
items.author: Anthony Slater
items.body_excerpt:
Pair of relevant notes on Kristaps Porzingis' new contract, per sources.

1. Only $3 million is guaranteed for the second season.

2. He's immediately trade eligible because of the structure of the two-year, $40 million extension (no more than 5% raise between yrs 1 and 2).

items.title: Note on Kristaps Porzingis' new contract with the Warriors:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Note on Kristaps Porzingis' new contract with the Warriors:

This is an extension (and it's already official) vs a new deal. The deal also didn't include greater than a 5% raise from Year 1 to Year 2.

That means that Porzingis is immediately trade-eligible. No restrictions.
